name: Ningbo Runhe High-Tech Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Runhe High-Tech Materials Co., Ltd. develops and manufactures various kinds of textile auxiliaries. It offers textile chemical series, such as multicomponent copolymerization epoxy silicone oil; and dyeing and finishing agent series, including block and modified silicone oil, emulsion, soft flake and ointment, wax emulsion, and pretreatment dyeing products. The company is based in Ningbo, China.
